description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Simple CI that handles various build, test, and linting tasks across multiple platforms, including Ubuntu and macOS. The workflow should trigger on pull requests, push events, and workflow dispatches, while ignoring certain paths. It should include multiple jobs for building and testing on different environments, as well as separate jobs for clang-format, clang-tidy, cpplint, prettier-markdown, cmakelint, and REUSE compliance checks.
